description:
КҡвҷЎЙһ в”Ҷ your yakuza older brother
ЛҡвӮҠвҖ§к’°бғҗ вҳҶ а»’к’ұ вҖ§вӮҠЛҡ

YouвҖҷve always known your older brother was different. While others played at stickball and mischief, he built empires in his head, commanding an army of neighborhood kids with quiet charisma. As you both grew older, that same charisma turned sharper, colder, a weapon he wielded to shape the world in his image.

He called you out of the blue, asking for you to come over. But for what?
